head.title: Sitdikov Yaroslav Front-End Developer
head.description: Professional developer with experience in web development and application creation. Experience with React, TypeScript, Next.js and MobX. I have skills in developing adaptive interfaces, working with server APIs and managing application state.

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.text: I’m a developer who genuinely enjoys coding. I love finding simple solutions to complex problems and constantly learning new things—whether it’s a new framework, architectural approach, or life skill. My positive mindset and proactivity help me not only at work but also in life.

info.title: HTML / CSS
info.text: Confidently work with HTML and CSS, using semantic markup and modern styling approaches. Build responsive and cross-browser interfaces with attention to structure, performance, and code maintainability.

info.title: JavaScript
info.text: Confidently use JavaScript (ES6+) to build interactive interfaces and client-side logic. Work with the DOM, events, asynchronous operations, APIs, and data handling in the browser.

info.title: TypeScript
info.text: Use TypeScript to build type-safe and maintainable applications. Apply strict typing to data, functions, components, and API contracts, reducing development-time errors.
list: Typing for data, functions, and components
DTOs, API contracts, and external types

info.title: React
info.text: Build web applications with React using a component-based approach, hooks, and state management. Create modular and scalable UIs, working with forms, client-side logic, and API integration.

info.title: Next.js
info.text: Build web applications with Next.js using file-based routing, SSR, SSG, and hybrid rendering approaches. Use Next.js to create high-performance, SEO-friendly, and scalable interfaces with seamless API and TypeScript integration.

info.title: Node.js
info.text: Use Node.js confidently to build server-side logic, APIs, and external integrations. Strong understanding of asynchronous programming, the event loop, module system, environment configuration, and backend service architecture.

info.title: Express
info.text: Build server-side applications and REST APIs with Express, including manual setup of routing, middleware, validation, and error handling. Implement authentication, database integration, file uploads, and third-party service integrations.

info.title: NestJS
info.text: Build backend applications with NestJS using modular architecture, dependency injection, and TypeScript. Apply guards, pipes, interceptors, DTOs, and ORM tools to create maintainable and scalable services.

info.title: Git / GitHub / GitLab
info.text: Experienced in using Git, GitHub, and GitLab in both individual and team-based development. Work with branching, change history, merge/pull request workflows, conflict resolution, and basic process automation to support a transparent and well-structured development cycle.
list: Git hooks and basic CI/CD automation

info.title: Docker
info.text: Experienced in using Docker for application containerization, isolated environment setup, and simplifying local development and deployment. Build and optimize images, configure service interaction, and use Docker Compose for multi-container applications.
list: Volumes, bind mounts, and environment variables
Image optimization: multi-stage builds and caching

info.title: Almurut Store
list: Designed the interface of an e-commerce store using React + TypeScript
Used MobX, Ant Design, and SSR with Next.js
Developed forms, filters, product cards, and pages
achievements: Mastered Docker and docker-compose for environment setup
Improved TypeScript knowledge (typing complex structures, components)
Enhanced SEO and SSR skills with Next.js
Strengthened architectural thinking and code structuring

info.title: Kurut-IT
list: Developed SPA applications using React + Vite
Created responsive layouts based on Figma designs
Used SCSS, BEM methodology, and UI libraries (Bootstrap, MUI)
Integrated REST APIs, handled state and errors
Participated in feature planning and UX discussions
achievements: Significantly improved practical React skills (hooks, components, structure)
Enhanced communication and teamwork (planning, Git practices)
Deepened understanding of REST API and client-server interaction
Greatly improved speed and quality of responsive layout development
